zh.lifeSummary: 當Francis Littlefield於1565年4月15日出生時，他的父親Francis Littlefield35歲，母親Annis Pope32歲。他於1590年與Mary Hill在英國哈普爾鐵費爾德聖 比特也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1618年10月21日在英國哈普爾法雷哈姆享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭哈普爾鐵費爾德聖 比特也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Littlefield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Littlefield Green in White Waltham, Berkshire. The placename derives from Old English lȳtel ‘little’ + feld ‘open country’.

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Francis Littlefield was born on 15 April 1565, his father, Francis Littlefield, was 35 and his mother, Annis Pope, was 32. He married Mary Hill in 1590, in St Peter's Church, Titchfield, Hampshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 21 October 1618, in Fareham, Hampshire, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in St Peter's Church, Titchfield, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Francis Littlefieldが1565年4月15日に生まれた時，父Francis Littlefieldは35歳，母Annis Popeは32歳であった。1590年にイギリスハンプシュアイアティトチフィールドスト ペテル'ス チャーチでMary Hillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1618年10月21日にイギリスハンプシュアイアファレハムで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアティトチフィールドスト ペテル'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Francis Littlefield(이)가 1565년 4월 15일에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Francis Littlefield(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Annis Pope(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1590년 영국 함프실르 티트ch필드 스트 피터'스 c후르치에서 Mary Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1618년 10월 21일 영국 함프실르 패레함에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 티트ch필드 스트 피터'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Francis Littlefield nasceu em 15 de abril de 1565, seu pai, Francis Littlefield, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Annis Pope, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Hill em 1590, em St Peter's Church, Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de outubro de 1618, em Fareham, Hampshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em St Peter's Church, Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Francis Littlefield родился 15 апреля 1565 г., его отцу по имени Francis Littlefield было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Annis Pope, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Hill в 1590 г. в местности ст питир'с чурч, тичфиелд, хампшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 21 октября 1618 г. в местности фарэам, хампшир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности ст питир'с чурч, тичфиелд, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Francis Littlefield nació el 15 de abril de 1565, su papá, Francis Littlefield, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Annis Pope, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Mary Hill en 1590, en St Peter's Church, Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 21 de octubre de 1618, en Fareham, Hampshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en St Peter's Church, Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
